key_facts: The product featured is the SME-DRM DIN rail mount sensor electronics.
The device provides 4-20 mA analog output and supports USB, Modbus (RS485), and Ethernet TCP/IP Modbus TCP communication.
It has an SD-card slot and a reset button.
The product is 'swiss made' and carries a 'CE' mark.
Rheonics specializes in inline process density and viscosity monitoring.
Contact information for Rheonics in Switzerland and USA is provided, including website, email, and phone numbers.
